content: agent1: working on Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion — touching src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and possibly src/click/core.py to add 'with' statements around make_context calls. Will check in before finalizing.

agent1 update: I made my change to shell_completion.py._resolve_context — wrapped make_context calls in 'with' statements (main ctx, sub_ctx for non-chained groups, sub_sub_ctx for chained groups) so contexts auto-close via __exit__, fixing the file-handle ResourceWarning. I did NOT modify core.py — I checked and Context already has the _depth counter (from commit c326df9, pre-existing) that correctly supports nested/reassigned 'with' blocks in _resolve_context, so no core.py changes were needed for my fix. If your validate_nesting work also touches _resolve_context in shell_completion.py, please rebase on top of my 'with'-wrapped version to avoid clobbering — happy to share my diff.
